message.content:
{
  "processingState": {

  "items": [
    {
      "basic": {
        "name": "大奉打更人",
        "type": "NOVEL",
        "countryName": "中国",
        "year": 2021,
        "ontologyVersion": "v1.0",
        "promptVersion": "CPR-1.2",
        "annotationModelVersion": "GPT-5.5",
        "generatorDate": "2025-04-09",
        "evidenceVersion": "v1.0",
        "annotationLanguage": "zh-CN",
        "confidence": 0.7,
        "primaryMediaType": "NOVEL"
      },
      "semantic": {
        "summary": "《大奉打更人》是一部仙侠探案类网络小说，将修仙修炼、朝堂权谋与案件侦破融为一体，语言诙谐幽默。故事发生在架空的大奉王朝，主角许七安身兼“打更人”职责，通过破解案件卷入朝廷斗争，同时借助仙侠修炼体系成长。情节紧凑，塑造了鲜活的高人气角色群像，带来解谜与爽感并存的阅读体验。",
        "themes": [
          "仙侠",
          "探案",
          "权谋",
          "成长",
          "幽默",
          "群像"
        ],
        "keywords": [
          "大奉王朝",
          "打更人",
          "许七安",
          "修仙",
          "朝堂",
          "案件侦破",
          "权谋",
          "诙谐",
          "灵气复苏",
          "修炼体系"
        ],
        "core_experience": "在轻松诙谐的语调下，跟随主角破解一桩桩奇案、应对朝堂暗流，体验修仙世界的奇妙与智斗的爽快，同时感受角色成长带来的成就与共鸣。",
        "experience_introduction": "《大奉打更人》通过诙谐的语言和紧凑的探案权谋剧情，营造出一种既要动脑推理又充满爽感的阅读体验。读者被引入一个兼具仙侠神秘与宫廷斗争的架空世界，在破解案件和应对政治阴谋的过程中，既获得智力挑战的满足，又享受主角实力提升带来的释放感。整体节奏明快，兼顾幽默与紧张，使受众在娱乐中体验角色的成长与群体羁绊。"
      },
      "experience_vector": {
        "passion": 0.7,
        "healing": 0.3,
        "awe": 0.5,
        "nostalgia": 0.1,
        "reflection": 0.5,
        "romance": 0.4,
        "tension": 0.8,
        "warmth": 0.6,
        "loneliness": 0.3,
        "hope": 0.7
      },
      "psychology_vector": {
        "cognitive": {
          "abstractness": 0.3,
          "complexity": 0.5,
          "depth_of_thought": 0.4,
          "logical_structure": 0.6,
          "novelty": 0.5,
          "exploration": 0.6,
          "ambiguity": 0.5,
          "predictability": 0.3,
          "information_density": 0.5,
          "learning_value": 0.3
        },
        "worldview": {
          "personal_scale": 0.5,
          "relationship_scale": 0.7,
          "social_scale": 0.7,
          "civilization_scale": 0.5,
          "cosmic_scale": 0.4,
          "time_span": 0.4,
          "fantasy_level": 0.8
        },
        "emotion": {
          "happiness": 0.6,
          "sadness": 0.4,
          "loneliness": 0.3,
          "warmth": 0.6,
          "fear": 0.4,
          "tension": 0.8,
          "awe": 0.5,
          "nostalgia": 0.1,
          "hope": 0.7,
          "melancholy": 0.2,
          "anger": 0.3,
          "peace": 0.4
        },
        "aesthetic": {
          "beauty": 0.4,
          "minimalism": 0.2,
          "luxury": 0.3,
          "darkness": 0.5,
          "brightness": 0.5,
          "dreamlike": 0.2,
          "mystery": 0.8,
          "experimental": 0.2,
          "classical": 0.4,
          "modern": 0.6
        },
        "narrative": {
          "plot_complexity": 0.7,
          "character_depth": 0.5,
          "character_growth": 0.8,
          "world_building": 0.7,
          "nonlinear_structure": 0.2,
          "slow_immersion": 0.3,
          "action_intensity": 0.6,
          "conflict_intensity": 0.7,
          "philosophical_depth": 0.3
        },
        "social_relationship": {
          "individualism": 0.5,
          "collectivism": 0.5,
          "family": 0.4,
          "friendship": 0.7,
          "love": 0.5,
          "community": 0.6,
          "competition": 0.8,
          "cooperation": 0.6,
          "power_relationship": 0.9,
          "identity": 0.5
        },
        "value": {
          "freedom": 0.6,
          "order": 0.7,
          "truth": 0.8,
          "beauty": 0.3,
          "achievement": 0.8,
          "justice": 0.8,
          "sacrifice": 0.5,
          "self_exploration": 0.4,
          "tradition": 0.3,
          "change": 0.5,
          "survival": 0.5,
          "meaning": 0.5
        },
        "behavior": {
          "curiosity": 0.8,
          "creation": 0.2,
          "adventure": 0.7,
          "reflection": 0.6,
          "competition": 0.8,
          "social": 0.7,
          "discipline": 0.5,
          "risk": 0.7,
          "calm": 0.3,
          "escape": 0.2
        },
        "sensory": {
          "visual_intensity": 0.3,
          "color_richness": 0.2,
          "sound_intensity": 0.1,
          "rhythm_energy": 0.6,
          "atmosphere": 0.6,
          "immersion": 0.7
        }
      },
      "media_vector": {
        "novel_vector": {
          "literary_depth": 0.3,
          "writing_style": 0.5,
          "narrative_voice": 0.6,
          "symbolism": 0.3,
          "inner_monologue": 0.5,
          "world_building_depth": 0.7
        }
      },
      "vector_facts": [
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.passion", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "故事中反复出现主角对权谋、案件和成长的强烈投入，驱动情节高速推进。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.healing", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "偶有温馨友情场面，但整体并非以治愈为核心基调。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.awe", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "仙侠世界设定带来一定奇幻感，但被诙谐语言冲淡了神秘敬畏。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.nostalgia", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "无怀旧元素，故事围绕当下事件展开。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.reflection", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "探案需要读者跟随线索思考，但整体娱乐性更强，反思深度有限。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.romance", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "存在部分感情线，但并非主要焦点。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.tension", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "朝堂斗争和案件侦破持续制造悬念和紧张氛围。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.warmth", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "伙伴间的互动和幽默对话带来一定的温暖感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.loneliness", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "主角常有盟友，孤独感并不突出。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.hope", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "主角不断成长、破局，整体走向充满希望和成就感。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.abstractness", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "叙事直接，比喻和象征较少，语言通俗易懂。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.complexity", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "权谋和案件交织，需同时处理多条信息。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.depth_of_thought", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "部分权谋有深度，但整体仍偏重娱乐性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.logical_structure", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "案件侦破要求逻辑推理，情节推进有一定因果关联。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.novelty", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "仙侠与探案的结合在当时具有一定新意。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.exploration", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "读者跟随主角探索修仙世界和破解谜案。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.ambiguity", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "案件和权谋存在信息不对称，但最终会揭示真相。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.predictability", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "主角通常能解决问题，预期较为明确，但案件转折仍有一定意外。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.information_density", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "包含修炼体系、朝堂规则等设定信息，密度中等。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.learning_value", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "以娱乐为主，较少提供真实世界知识。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.personal_scale", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "聚焦主角成长，但周围人物众多，不完全局限于个人视角。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.relationship_scale", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "注重角色间的关系网，群像塑造明显。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.social_scale", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "朝堂权力结构和社会阶层是核心舞台。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.civilization_scale", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "涉及国家政治，但未展开多文明对比。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.cosmic_scale", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "修仙体系带有一点宇宙观，但未深入探索。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.time_span", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "时间跨度不显著，集中在主角的几年经历。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.fantasy_level", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "完全架空，包含修仙、灵气、超自然力量等幻想元素。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.happiness", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "幽默诙谐的文风经常引发愉悦情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.sadness", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "偶尔有牺牲或遗憾情节，但不占主导。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.loneliness", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "主角与盟友关系紧密，孤独感弱。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.warmth", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "友情和团队互动带来温暖色调。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.fear", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "朝堂阴谋和强者压迫会产生恐惧感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.tension", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "案件追查和权力博弈持续营造紧绷感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.awe", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "高阶修士和秘境引发惊叹，但非核心。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.nostalgia", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "故事当代性明显，不唤起怀旧。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.hope", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "正面成长轨迹和翻盘情节强化希望感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.melancholy", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "少数段落带有些许惆怅，但非基调。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.anger", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "对不公事件有愤怒反应，但不渲染。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.peace", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "日常诙谐部分带来平和时刻。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.beauty", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "文字对美的描写一般，重点在情节推进。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.minimalism", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "风格更偏丰富和鲜活，非极简。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.luxury", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "皇家朝堂有华贵元素，但不突出。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.darkness", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "朝堂阴谋和暗杀等带来阴暗面。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.brightness", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "幽默和主角胜利保持明亮基调。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.dreamlike", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "叙事偏现实，即便有修仙亦不梦幻。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.mystery", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "案件悬疑和隐藏势力贯穿始终，神秘感强。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.experimental", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "叙事结构传统，无实验性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.classical", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "有古代王朝设定，但语言现代化。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.modern", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "网络小说风格，现代口语化对白和节奏。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.plot_complexity", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "多条案件与权谋线交织，层次较丰富。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_depth", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "角色有成长弧光，但深度非主打。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_growth", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "主角及部分配角有明确的实力与心性成长。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.world_building", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "构建了完整的朝堂制度和修仙体系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.nonlinear_structure", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "基本为线性叙事，偶有插叙。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.slow_immersion", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "节奏较快，不刻意渲染氛围。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.action_intensity", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "战斗和冲突场面较多，动作性强。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.conflict_intensity", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "利益斗争和生死危机频繁出现。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.philosophical_depth", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "少哲学思辨，以情节驱动为主。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.individualism", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "主角倾向个人行动，但也有团队协作。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.collectivism", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "群体目标和友情占据重要位置。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.family", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "家庭关系不是核心，仅部分背景描写。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.friendship", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "深厚的伙伴关系是重要情感支撑。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.love", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "感情线存在但并非主线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.community", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "打更人团体形成小型社群。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.competition", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "朝堂斗争、势力博弈和武力对抗频繁。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.cooperation", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "联合办案和结盟是常见模式。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.power_relationship", "score": 0.9, "explanation": "权力争夺是核心驱动力，等级森严。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.identity", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "对身份如打更人、官员有一定探讨。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.freedom", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "主角渴望打破束缚，行为自主性高。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.order", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "王朝律法和打更人职责强调秩序。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.truth", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "探案核心即追寻事件真相。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.beauty", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "对美学追求不显著。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.achievement", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "实力提升和地位晋级是明确目标。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.justice", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "打更人维护正义、惩治恶人是重要主题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.sacrifice", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "有自我牺牲情节，但非主旋律。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.self_exploration", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "主角较少内省，更多向外行动。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.tradition", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "对传统通常持批判或突破态度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.change", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "主角推动制度变革，但非主线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.survival", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "危机中生存是底层驱动力。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.meaning", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "对人生意义偶有触及，但非重点。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.curiosity", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "案件和解谜激发强烈好奇心。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.creation", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "非建造或创造类行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.adventure", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "探索秘境、冒险破案是主要行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.reflection", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "推理过程需要反思和复盘。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.competition", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "极多争夺资源、地位和战斗的竞争行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.social", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "频繁的社交互动和联盟建立。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.discipline", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "修炼需要自律，但主角常有不羁。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.risk", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "多次冒险行动和豪赌决策。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.calm", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "情绪起伏较大，平静时刻较少。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.escape", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "逃避非主题，通常主动面对困境。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.visual_intensity", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "作为小说，视觉描写有限，依赖想象。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.color_richness", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "色彩描写较少，非重点。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.sound_intensity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "声音描写非核心，偶有战斗声响。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.rhythm_energy", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "紧凑的情节和频繁冲突带来高节奏感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.atmosphere", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "悬疑与权谋营造出特有的氛围。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.immersion", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "快节奏和爽感使读者容易沉浸。" },

        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.novel_vector.literary_depth", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "网络小说偏重娱乐性，文学性较弱。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.novel_vector.writing_style", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "诙谐直白，有一定风格但未达到高度个性化。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.novel_vector.narrative_voice", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "第一人称或第三人称有限视角，带主角心理活动。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.novel_vector.symbolism", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "很少使用象征手法。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.novel_vector.inner_monologue", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "有主角内心独白，用于推理和吐槽。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.novel_vector.world_building_depth", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "详尽构建了修仙等级、官制和势力版图。" }
      ],
      "experience_vector_summary": {
        "experience_description": "这部作品提供了一种以悬疑推进和实力成长为驱动的复合体验。读者始终被案件谜团和权谋暗战牵引，体验到紧张与解惑后的舒畅交替。同时，幽默的语言和伙伴间的插科打诨带来轻松情绪，冲淡了沉重的权力斗争色彩。整体上，大脑处于活跃的解谜和期待升级的状态，最终在主角不断突破中获得强烈的爽感和希望。",
        "structure_description": "叙事结构以线性为主，围绕一个个案件和朝堂事件串联，每个案件通常包含疑惑、调查、反转和解决，并穿插主角修炼和势力扩张的长期主线。节奏紧凑，几乎不拖沓，通过不断设置短期悬念来维持读者注意力。高潮部分往往伴随激烈冲突和权力洗牌，形成情节上的爆发点。整体结构服务于爽文模式，但案中案的嵌套增加了层次感。",
        "cognitive_expression": "作品要求读者投入大量认知资源进行逻辑推理，跟随线索猜测真凶或阴谋。同时，需要理解多层级的权力关系和修仙规则，形成一套内在世界观的心智模型。由于语言幽默，即使推理复杂，认知负荷仍被保持在娱乐可接受的范围。此外，多重势力的博弈也锻炼了策略思维，但不需要深层哲学思辨。",
        "behavioral_tendency_description": "阅读此作品会激发读者持续的探索欲和竞争意识，向往主角的冒险精神和机智反击。它鼓励一种主动解谜、以智取胜的行为倾向，同时也强化了通过努力修炼获得成就的价值观念。社交层面，作品推崇伙伴间的信任与合作，以及对不公权威的反抗，可能鼓励读者在现实中保持敏锐和正义感。"

      },

        "主角担任打更人，职责包含调查案件、维护治安。",
        "作品将修炼体系与案件侦破深度融合，破案常依赖修为和特殊能力。",

我需要生成完整的 CPR。根据规范，必须生成 basic, semantic, experience_vector, psychology_vector, media_vector, experience_vector_summary, personality_affinity, supporting_evidence, quality_control。还要生成 processingState。

首先，给作品分类为 NOVEL。那么 media_vector 应该是 novel_vector。

semantic: summary 应描述作品核心内容、艺术形式、核心冲突等。themes 和 keywords。

根据 introduction：“仙侠探案类网络小说，将仙侠修炼、朝堂权谋与案件侦破熔于一炉，语言诙谐，情节紧凑，创造了高人气角色群。”所以 summary 可以写：“本作为仙侠探案类网络小说，融合了修仙世界、朝廷权谋与侦探推理等元素。主角在架空的大奉王朝中，以打更人身份卷入各类案件与政治斗争，同时借助修炼体系逐步成长。语言幽默，情节紧凑，塑造了鲜明的角色群像。”大概100字。
